_comment: Optional external signals for the MiroFish market researcher.
_usage: Add an entry per Polymarket market ID. Each signal is in [-1, 1].

_fields.sentiment: Overall sentiment: -1 = very bearish, 0 = neutral, +1 = very bullish
_fields.volume_trend: Recent volume trend: -1 = declining, 0 = flat, +1 = increasing
_fields.news_impact: Latest news impact: -1 = negative, 0 = neutral, +1 = positive
